## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Tribe AI and GrowthX to discuss content strategy and lead generation efforts.](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [New AI-powered workflows being developed to create unique content from Tribe AI's materials](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)
  - [Need to implement lead capture mechanisms (e.g. Koala) to gather data on site visitors and enable follow-ups](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=122.0)
  - [Shift in content strategy focus: create practical frameworks/guides addressing common client questions/objections](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=362.0)
  - [Unclear priorities and next steps - team to regroup to align on direction](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)

## Topics

### Content Creation Process Updates

  - [New "trusted source" workflow being developed to create unique content from Tribe AI materials (voice notes, decks, etc.)](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=153.0)
  - [ETA for new workflow: next Monday](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=180.0)
  - [Separate AI-powered process being created to extract references from real-life enterprise AI case studies](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=186.0)
  - [Team working on calibrating content topics (e.g. ROI, AI model optimization, GenAI costs)](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)

### SEO and Content Visibility

  - [SEO articles removed from blog section - concerns about visibility to visitors and Google crawlers](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=261.0)
  - [Articles with outdated year mentions (2023) updated for better SEO](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=324.0)
  - [Discussion on how to make desired content more visible](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)

### Lead Capture and Visitor Tracking

  - [Recommendation to implement Koala for detailed visitor tracking:](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=700.0)
      - [Identifies companies visiting the site](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=741.0)
      - [Matches visitors to Salesforce data](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=727.0)
      - [Enables triggers/alerts for sales team follow-up](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=763.0)
  - [Current lack of nurture process for blog visitors](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=420.0)
  - [Suggestion to create lead magnets (reports, checklists, webinars) to capture visitor information](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=507.0)

### Content Repurposing and Enrichment

  - [New "refresh flow" being developed to enrich existing articles with new information](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=925.0)
  - [Experiment with distilling key takeaways from video transcripts/presentations](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1038.0)
  - [Suggestion to create webinar-style content from Jaclyn's event presentations](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [Focus on creating content that addresses common follow-up questions and objections from sales conversations](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=461.0)
  - [Develop frameworks and guides that help potential clients think through AI implementation](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1104.0)
  - [Create content that sales team can use as follow-up materials](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=513.0)

### Case Study Content Approach

  - [Proposal to create high-level overviews of AI use cases across industries (e.g. financial services)](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1815.0)
  - [Aim to attract top-of-funnel interest without going too deep into technical specifics](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1836.0)
  - [Guide interested leads to schedule calls for more tailored discussions](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1869.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Marcel to share CRO tactics document with Jaclyn for lead capture strategy](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=627.0)
  - [Team to implement basic lead capture mechanisms (e.g. Koala) to start gathering visitor data](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=859.0)
  - [Jaclyn to review sample case study content shared by Jimmy](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1803.0)
  - [Schedule follow-up meeting to clarify priorities and align on content strategy direction](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=2060.0)
  - [Continue iterating on content creation process, treating current outputs as MVPs to refine](https://fathom.video/share/cNHeXQS7aQeB3V-qxMKZfueeBKpUZGv5?tab=summary&timestamp=1728.0)
